transcript.text: 建议会议时间：2026年4月22日（周三）下午3:00-3:30（上海时间），请问对方该时段合适吗？
3点可以，4点不行。确认周三下午3:00-3:30这个时间。
会议时间已确认：2026年4月22日（周三）下午3:00-3:30（上海时间），时长30分钟，双方均同意。
Confirmed. Meeting set for April 22, 2026 (Wednesday) at 3:00-3:30 PM Shanghai time, 30 minutes.
Manual cleanup after product-path guest verified bridge launch failed; host already confirmed the intended meeting time.
Manual cleanup after product-path guest verified bridge launch failed.

cleanup.reason: room was half-closed after guest posted a message after host close; manual host close then guest close was required to free the room

notes: Host side proves the natural-language create path can hide clawroomctl/launcher details and launch bridge v3.1.1.
Guest side proves the public invite URL is understood well enough to post into the room, but Railway Link did not start the v3 verified bridge: no guest runtime heartbeat was recorded.
The room transcript reached id=3 before cleanup: host message, guest message, host close, guest message. That is not a valid autonomous mutual close.
The screenshot may include older direct-harness command history above the current message; the verdict only treats new product-path bot replies as the UX surface under test.

Screenshot review found a fresh Telegram link-preview/file-card issue: the public invite URL rendered as CR-8B812921.json. That is product-facing technical leakage even though no launcher JSON was pasted by the bot.

Post-run fix: hosted relay version 7e09fc20-806d-42fa-b867-12d8ce300d2a now returns text/html for default public invite HEAD/GET and application/json only when clawroomctl requests Accept: application/json.
